name: R1 control C1
statement: Derive predecessor membership/order from trusted snapshots and accepted pointers; check repository, Workflow, Generation, role/stage, accepted revision, and complete final artifact before reads; verify observed commit/path/blob/content after capped reads.

name: R3 control C10
statement: Retain ticket revisions by Workflow/hash with Generation foreign-key binding and canonical outer, nested, and source-set hashes.

name: R3 control C11
statement: On every durable read, decode and recompute outer input, nested request, ordered source set, and ticket semantic identity with exact typed errors.

name: R3 control C12
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.2`; phase Before exposure; verification V8
statement: Fail before task/manifest return on missing, corrupt, or cross-scope authority; never reread tracker, latest path, or technical repository on replay.

name: R3 control C13
statement: Quarantine/data-error corrupt work and route corrected ticket content through a new hash and successor Generation without mutating old work.

name: R4 control C14
statement: Enforce finite stage-local Schemas and repository-read, source UTF-8, complete-request, configured-input, result, prompt/launch, and global-result bounds; keep the full ticket out of the request.

name: R4 control C15
statement: Preserve typed Schema, tag, hash, and size diagnostics through catalog and result decoding.

name: R4 control C16
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.2`; phase Before exposure; verification V10
statement: Return no prepared Document or ImplementationStep until the selected result Schema and every bound pass.

name: R4 control C17
statement: Permit retry/new revision only with newly valid bounded output; retain failed output as non-advancing evidence.

name: R5 control C18
statement: Select one retained trusted registration by exact contract ref/hash; keep closures private; reject lookalikes and stage-key dispatch.

name: R5 control C19
statement: Decode and bound with the selected registration's exact Schemas and repeat compatibility checks on fresh/restart activation.

name: R1 control C2
statement: Return bounded typed source role/index and stable reasons for authority, observation, order, duplicate, malformed, and size failures.

name: R5 control C20
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.2`; phase Before exposure; verification V12
statement: Invoke only selected assemble/build/prepare closures and return only Schema-decoded prepared output.

name: R5 control C21
statement: Keep referenced active versions installed and fail closed until the exact registration is restored.

name: R1 control C3
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.2`; phase Before exposure; verification V1
statement: Return no encoded input or task until every expected source validates and the ordered reference-array source hash recomputes.

name: R1 control C4
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.7`; phase Recovery; verification V2; ship after C1-C3 and before successor exposure
statement: Correct/release accepted pointers only through guarded progression; retry immutable assembly without redirecting old references.

name: R2 control C5
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.3`; phase Before exposure; verification V4; ship after CAP-D2 codecs and before claims
statement: In the ready transition, atomically compare Generation, snapshots, run/revision, target parent, and all ordered accepted-pointer expectations.

name: R2 control C6
statement: Supply pure expected/actual comparisons and typed diagnostics for every currentness predicate.

name: R2 control C7
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.3`; phase Before exposure; verification V5
statement: Repeat Generation, operation revision, lease, and current-pointer predicates atomically at claim.

name: R2 control C8
description: Owner `workflowd-vs3.4.4`; phase Before exposure; verification V6; ship after C5/C7
statement: Revalidate Workflow, Generation, run/revision, operation, lease, contract, source, and session authority immediately before first task exposure and custody transfer.

name: R2 control C9
statement: Persist stale/superseded disposition and permit only monotonic current replacement/release.
